disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www

| | Hi there,

The New Hampshire Senate race has been neck-and-neck for months, but now Republican incumbent Sen. Kelly Ayotte is in BIG trouble.

In a debate this week she was asked if she thought Trump was a good role model for children. Her answer: "Absolutely."

I can't think of a better reason to make sure our Senate candidate, Gov. Maggie Hassan, defeats Ayotte in November. So are we going to make sure Maggie has the resources she needs to win?

Absolutely.

**[Maggie's team set a goal to raise $100,000 by midnight tonight. Donate $3 now to help her defeat Ayotte. 100% of your donation will go directly to Maggie's campaign.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0940/24c69fd9/12349527/18eb5621/3793473836/VEsE/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/maggie-hassan1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Maggies+team+set+a+goal+to+raise+100000+&utm_campaign=WPEFCV19N_digital_email_20161008_Maggie_sn-all&source=WPEFCV19N_digital_email_20161008_Maggie_sn-all")**

It's not just her comments at the debate that Ayotte has to answer for. As a senator, she voted six times to defund Planned Parenthood and four times against equal pay. She's said _Roe v. Wade_ should be overturned and supported a national abortion ban.

Maggie is perfectly poised to flip this seat. She's been popular as the state's governor, where she worked to expand Medicaid coverage and freeze college tuition costs. And she's ready to fight for equal pay and women's health care in the Senate.

The most recent poll -- which was taken before this week's debate, the audio of Trump bragging about sexual assault, and Ayotte desperately trying to distance herself -- showed Maggie two points ahead. We haven't even seen numbers yet on how New Hampshire voters are feeling now.

New Hampshire voters are key to flipping the Senate, so much so that Nate Silver said, "A voter in New Hampshire has 16x more power to determine who controls the Senate than an average American voter."

Make sure Maggie has the resources to reach as many voters as possible and win.

**Donate $3 to help hit her $100,000 goal before midnight tonight. 100% of your donation will go directly to her campaign:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Help-Maggie-Now](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0940/24c69fd9/12349527/18eb5622/3793473836/VEsF/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/maggie-hassan1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHelpMaggieNow&utm_campaign=WPEFCV19N_digital_email_20161008_Maggie_sn-all&source=WPEFCV19N_digital_email_20161008_Maggie_sn-all")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

Peter,

I wanted to make sure you saw Mr. Trump's email below.

**I am going to be printing off the list of supporters for Mr. Trump at 8:30 tonight.**

There's still time to get your name on the list before Mr. Trump takes the stage.

[**Contribute now to get your name on the list.**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38031265:WlIuBFb7N:m:1:1155937413:3D330C96DB4C9583E8617F465836DD73:r)

This is going to be the biggest night of the election. Your support will certainly make a difference.

Thanks,

Brad Parscale
Digital Director
Donald J. Trump for President

[| [**CONTRIBUTE NOW**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38031265:WlIuBFb7N:m:1:1155937413:3D330C96DB4C9583E8617F465836DD73:r)](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38031265:WlIuBFb7N:m:1:1155937413:3D330C96DB4C9583E8617F465836DD73:r)
---

**\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Donald J. Trump
Subject: As I take the stage tomorrow:
To: Brad Parscale**

[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38031265:WlIuBFb7N:m:1:1155937413:3D330C96DB4C9583E8617F465836DD73:r)

Brad,

Tomorrow night I am going on stage to fight for the American people.

I am ready to win. And I am ready to make you proud.

[**Now will you do the honor of making a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $25, $15, or $5 before I take the stage and fight for you?**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38031265:WlIuBFb7N:m:1:1155937413:3D330C96DB4C9583E8617F465836DD73:r)

Tomorrow's debate is the most important night of this election.

So many voters are undecided, so many voters are starving for change. And tomorrow, we get the opportunity to show them that one campaign is offering a real opportunity for change.

We offer a change from the failed Clinton-Obama foreign policy.

We offer a change from the disaster of ObamaCare.

We offer a change from the economic policies that cripple American business, stifle innovation, and crush the American worker.

We offer a change from the immigration policies that have kept our borders wide open and brought in tens of thousands of refugees from countries rife with terrorism.

70% of Americans are ready for change. And tomorrow I will show America that we will deliver that change.

[**Now join me as I take the stage to fight for change by making a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $25, $15, or $5 before the big debate.**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38031265:WlIuBFb7N:m:1:1155937413:3D330C96DB4C9583E8617F465836DD73:r)

Thank you and God bless you,

Donald J. Trump

It proved to me once again that our movement is truly based on pure love of country.

body:
Greg for Montana

Today marks 30 days left in the campaign

Friend,

Did you watch the debate
yesterday? What a win for Greg!

As always, I'm so proud of Greg.
He's been giving his whole heart to this race, every ounce of
energy traveling the state to hear from Montanans.

Today marks 30 days left in this
campaign. Would you chip in a $30 special donation to give Greg
another boost of support?

It's hard to see Greg criticized,
and watch our opponents try to tarnish his record of success.

I've seen Greg build a small
business into a global company, employing hundreds of Montanans.

I know Greg's heart for helping
others - mentoring entrepreneurs across the state and encouraging
even high school kids to think about starting their own business.

I believe Greg's message of
prosperity for all Montanans, and bringing our kids home to
better jobs is something that resonates across the state.

Friend, please consider a $30
donation - $1 for each day left, I know it will give him an extra
shot in the arm!

Greg is demonstrating every day
that he is fighting to win and lead our state in a better
direction.

Thank you for your support,

Susan Gianforte

Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO
Box 1557, Helena, MT, 59624, Republican

Friend,

Eric has given me a list of supporters that made a contribution.

Here are the first 150, proudly representing their states and the contributions they sacrificed to Make America Great Again!

I hope your name will be on the final list.
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecdbaSBlBACYF9BPlOoaGOApDRMN6aaaaGOApBL4U2Eka?r=5@z4xA2A&b=gmzfoilp94_jjdfo.Zrj&o=f&0=&o=4x3643BYhcroh7weh7vbflqaBahYdqh7ggw7lkk7mcf7w7w7kcBb&w7w)
[**Please contribute $100, $65, $50, $35, $25, $15, $10, or $5 to show your support before I take the stage TONIGHT at 9 PM ET.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecdbaSBlBACYF9BPlOoaGOApDRMN6aaaaGOApBL4U2Eka?r=5@z4xA2A&b=gmzfoilp94_jjdfo.Zrj&o=c&0=&o=4x3643BYhcroh7weh7vbflqaBahYdqh7ggw7lkk7mcf7w7w7kcBb&w7w)

I've been preparing for tonight's debate as if the entire election depends upon it. I'm ready to win.

**I want to talk about the issues tonight because that 's what the American people deserve.**

Our campaign took off because we talked about the issues that our incompetent politicians ignored for decades -- one of which was _illegal immigration_ , another was _creating jobs_ , and another was keeping America _safe._

We won the primary on the issues, and we will win the White House on the issues.

As I've always said, this is your movement. I'm only your voice.

And tonight I'm taking the stage to fight for you. I am going on that stage to fight for the American people and against the rigged system that Hillary represents.

Hillary has had over 30 years to prove she can fix our country. By all accounts, she has failed.

It's time for change -- real change.

And together, you and I are going to be the ones who deliver that change.

This debate is our opportunity to show the rest of the country that we offer a different path forward. Our platform promises a freer, safer, and more prosperous America.

I hope you'll stand with me at this pivotal movement.

[**Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $25, $15, or $5 to show your support before the big debate.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecdbaSBlBACYF9BPlOoaGOApDRMN6aaaaGOApBL4U2Eka?r=5@z4xA2A&b=gmzfoilp94_jjdfo.Zrj&o=d&0=&o=4x3643BYhcroh7weh7vbflqaBahYdqh7ggw7lkk7mcf7w7w7kcBb&w7w)

Thank you,

Donald J. Trump

After we heard the disgusting comments Donald Trump made about women and his boasts of sexual harassment, I called on Senator Rubio to withdraw his endorsement of Trump.

But guess what? He still hasn't.

**This is a new low, even for Marco Rubio.** Donald Trump is a threat to every value this country holds dear. Sen. Rubio's cowardly failure to stand up to him shows that he'll never stand up for Florida in the Senate.

[**If you think it 's time we had a Senator who doesn't put his own political ambition before the good of our country, please donate to our campaign >>**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2d86/738133e4/312abb3d/7f857154/741247528/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161009?refcode=pme161009_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

body:
---
Friend,

The only thing you can count on being true in Mr. Gianforte's attack ads is the "Paid for by Greg Gianforte" disclaimer line at the end.

**Steve made that clear during last night 's debate.** But Greg Gianforte is spending millions of dollars on underhanded attack ads. Unfortunately, a lot more people see his commercials than watched the debate. **[Will you pitch in $15 to celebrate Steve's clear debate victory?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=fJAnM9jWEKxxF697DxzraRBBnxlcq9Ju)**

Greg Gianforte didn't have a good night. He repeatedly stumbled while trying to explain away the lawsuit he filed to block stream access, justified budget-busting tax breaks for the wealthy and misled about his record of outsourcing jobs.

Voting begins in two days. **[Help send Steve into this week with the clear momentum. Donate $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=7SubIowVOHdGAaClmdpiohBBnxlcq9Ju)**

Thanks,
Eric Hyers ****

That's what _The Intelligencer - Wheeling News-Register_ [called](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.theintelligencer.net%2Fopinion%2Feditorials%2F2016%2F10%2Fjustices-unpaid-taxes-troubling%2F&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=troubling&n=1) NPR's [revelation](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwvpublic.org%2Fpost%2Fbillionaire-gubernatorial-candidate-owes-15-million-taxes-and-fines&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=troubling&n=2) that Jim Justice has some $15 million in unpaid mining fine violations and taxes. Read the full editorial below. You can listen to NPR discuss how unsafe Justice's mining operations really are [here](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsoundcloud.com%2Fkent-gates%2Fjim-justices-unsafe-mines&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=troubling&n=3). The _Gazette-Mail_ reports that Jim Justice's defense is that he's "made a lot of mistakes". He's made at least 15 million of them according to _NPR_. The _Gazette Mail_ went on to report that Justice wants "nothing but goodness for our state". If that were the case why is he trying to [stiff ](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.documentcloud.org%2Fdocuments%2F3124388-JusticeWVTaxLiens.html&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=troubling&n=4)West Virginians for $4.7 million in the midst of a fiscal crisis?
Billionaire businessman Jim Justice says that if West Virginians will just elect him governor, he can repair most of what’s wrong with our state. He could start right now — by paying the more than $3.5 million in delinquent taxes he reportedly owes the state. Justice, who has the money to provide his election campaign with $2.9 million in loans and in-kind support, apparently has trouble coming up with money to pay about $15 million in taxes and fines owed to six states and the federal government, National Public Radio reported last week. Included in the total reported by NPR were $6 million in withholding and severance taxes in West Virginia and five other states, $5.4 million owed to counties in those states — and $2.6 million in penalties for violations of federal mine safety regulations. Of the total, $4.71 million is owed in West Virginia, where Justice owns The Greenbrier resort and some mining operations. Around $1 million of that is owed to the federal government for fines levied against Justice’s coal mines. It is bad enough that, if the NPR report is accurate, Justice was failing to pay millions of dollars owed to the state even as West Virginia legislators and Gov. Earl Ray Tomblin were struggling earlier this year to balance the budget. Higher taxes and borrowing from the state’s Rainy Day Fund were needed to accomplish that. Even more troubling in a way is that Justice allegedly owes millions of dollars in delinquent property taxes to some counties, primarily in Kentucky. It will not have escaped the notice of Mountain State voters that declining tax revenue has forced some county school systems to cut back severely. Justice is worth $1.56 billion, according to Forbes. He is easily the richest man in West Virginia. He says his business success is why he ought to be governor. Yet, if the NPR story is accurate, he doesn’t pay his bills on time — while at least some of those owed have to tighten their belts for financial reasons. **

Friend -- I was extremely disturbed to learn of presidential candidate Donald Trump's demeaning remarks about women -- especially his description of a sexual assault.

Republicans and Democrats alike should agree that the attitude towards women Mr. Trump has displayed has no place in our society. **This isn't politics. It's basic decency.**

And yet, my opponent Congressman Todd Young says he's "not sure yet" as to whether or not he'll support Mr. Trump for president, but he's giving "serious consideration" to the question. Congressman Young's indecisive attitude in the face of such despicable behavior is unacceptable.

[_**Add your name to tell Congressman Young "serious consideration" isn't good enough.**_](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50520/7be36b49/1e4f8fae/78f83ee4/1295990450/VEsE/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/page/s/tell-todd-young-to-rescind-his-support-for-donald-trump")

By now it's perfectly clear that Mr. Trump doesn't represent Hoosier values. If Congressman Young doesn't see that, he doesn't deserve to represent Indiana in the Senate.

[**_Tell Congressman Young to rescind his support for Donald Trump immediately._**](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50520/7be36b49/1e4f8fae/78f83ee4/1295990450/VEsF/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/page/s/tell-todd-young-to-rescind-his-support-for-donald-trump")

Thank you,

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Deborah Ross
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
Sisters and Brothers,
Our political revolution is responsible for the most progressive Democratic platform in the history of our country. That is the direct result of the grassroots activism that you, and millions of others, engaged in over the last 18 months.
Now, for the future of our country and our progressive agenda, it is imperative that Democrats regain control of the Senate with a progressive majority. Perhaps the most important reason to do so is because **we must elect senators who will support nominees for the Supreme Court who will vote to overturn Citizens United.**
One race where we have a very good chance of winning a seat currently held by a Republican is in North Carolina's Senate race. But the Koch brothers know the stakes of this race too, and they know that they can't afford to lose a reliable vote that would stop Citizens United from being overturned. That's why the Koch brothers are spending millions of dollars to win that election.
Deborah Ross is the Democratic nominee for Senate in North Carolina. She is a strong progressive with whom I would be proud to serve in the U.S. Senate. She's not afraid to stand up to big polluters while moving us towards clean energy. She's fought for equal pay for women and good jobs for everyone. I know that Deborah Ross would make a fantastic member of the U.S. Senate -- one who would stand up for working families no matter what.
You better believe the Koch brothers don't like Deborah Ross very much.
In order to ensure that we win a progressive majority in the United States Senate, we must help Deborah Ross win in November. That is why I am asking you directly:
[**Your contribution of $2.70 will help Deborah Ross win her race for Senate in North Carolina. Please make a contribution to her today so we can advance our progressive agenda, defeat the Koch brothers, and take back the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/deborah-ross?refcode=em161009-a "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/deborah-ross?refcode=em161009-a")
We were victorious in making it a clear priority of the Democratic Party to fight for a $15 an hour federal minimum wage, expand Social Security, abolish the death penalty, put a price on carbon, enact major criminal justice reforms, end for-profit prisons and detention facilities, break up too-big-to-fail banks and create a 21st century Glass-Steagall Act, and so much more.
Our job is to make sure that platform is implemented. That will not happen without Democratic control of the Senate.
The Supreme Court's Citizens United ruling handed millionaires and billionaires -- who have already rigged the economy -- unlimited influence in American elections. It gave billionaires like the Koch Brothers and Sheldon Adelson the opportunity to spend hundreds of millions of dollars to elect candidates who will represent their interests.
The Koch brothers, who want to move us toward an oligarchic form of society, are making a bet in the race for Senate in North Carolina. They think that their big money can buy this election. And they're using the Citizens United decision to do it.
**I want our political revolution to make a different bet:** one that says campaigns powered by small contributions of whatever people can afford, backed by a grassroots movement of volunteers, can take on big money and win elections.
It is so important we do everything we can to help Deborah Ross win her election in November.
[**Please make a contribution of $2.70/HPC to Deborah Ross's campaign today to help her become the next senator from the state of North Carolina so she can fight with me to implement our progressive agenda.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/deborah-ross?refcode=em161009-a "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/deborah-ross?refcode=em161009-a")
Thank you as always for everything you do for our political revolution.
In solidarity,
Senator Bernie Sanders
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/deborah-ross?refcode=em161009-a "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/deborah-ross?refcode=em161009-a")**

clean_body: Sisters and Brothers, Our political revolution is responsible for the most progressive Democratic platform in the history of our country. That is the direct result of the grassroots activism that you, and millions of others, engaged in over the last 18 months. Now, for the future of our country and our progressive agenda, it is imperative that Democrats regain control of the Senate with a progressive majority. Perhaps the most important reason to do so is because we must elect senators who will support nominees for the Supreme Court who will vote to overturn Citizens United. One race where we have a very good chance of winning a seat currently held by a Republican is in North Carolina's Senate race. But the Koch brothers know the stakes of this race too, and they know that they can't afford to lose a reliable vote that would stop Citizens United from being overturned. That's why the Koch brothers are spending millions of dollars to win that election. Deborah Ross is the Democratic nominee for Senate in North Carolina. She is a strong progressive with whom I would be proud to serve in the U.S. Senate. She's not afraid to stand up to big polluters while moving us towards clean energy. She's fought for equal pay for women and good jobs for everyone. I know that Deborah Ross would make a fantastic member of the U.S. Senate -- one who would stand up for working families no matter what. You better believe the Koch brothers don't like Deborah Ross very much. In order to ensure that we win a progressive majority in the United States Senate, we must help Deborah Ross win in November. That is why I am asking you directly: "" We were victorious in making it a clear priority of the Democratic Party to fight for a $15 an hour federal minimum wage, expand Social Security, abolish the death penalty, put a price on carbon, enact major criminal justice reforms, end for-profit prisons and detention facilities, break up too-big-to-fail banks and create a 21st century Glass-Steagall Act, and so much more. Our job is to make sure that platform is implemented. That will not happen without Democratic control of the Senate. The Supreme Court's Citizens United ruling handed millionaires and billionaires -- who have already rigged the economy -- unlimited influence in American elections. It gave billionaires like the Koch Brothers and Sheldon Adelson the opportunity to spend hundreds of millions of dollars to elect candidates who will represent their interests. The Koch brothers, who want to move us toward an oligarchic form of society, are making a bet in the race for Senate in North Carolina. They think that their big money can buy this election. And they're using the Citizens United decision to do it. I want our political revolution to make a different bet: one that says campaigns powered by small contributions of whatever people can afford, backed by a grassroots movement of volunteers, can take on big money and win elections. It is so important we do everything we can to help Deborah Ross win her election in November. "" Thank you as always for everything you do for our political revolution. In solidarity, Senator Bernie Sanders "" Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402

Jim should focus on getting his companies finances in order before he asks for the public's support to elect him governor. | | Hi there,

Tonight's the second presidential debate.

It's not going to be like any debate we've ever seen before, so we're doing something we've never done before.

On Friday, audio was released of Donald Trump bragging about sexually assaulting women. We want to make sure everyone who's following the debate online tonight knows EXACTLY where Trump stands with women.

**[Update your profile picture before the debate with our new Women Can Stop Trump overlay to send a message to Trump, your friends, and everyone who may still be on the fence about this election.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0921/24c69fd9/128baab6/18eb41fa/4271610936/VEsE/ "http://twibbon.com/support/womencanstoptrump-4?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Update+your+profile+picture+before+the+d&utm_campaign=WPENEV23N_digital_email_20161009_WCSTprofile_n-all&source=WPENEV23N_digital_email_20161009_WCSTprofile_n-all")**

To update your profile picture on Facebook or Twitter, just click the link and follow the three-step instructions to add the Women Can Stop Trump overlay.

Many people don't just watch the TV during the debate. They're also watching Facebook and Twitter to see what their friends are saying. And many reporters are looking to see how people are reacting to the candidates.

Imagine seeing your feeds FILLED with Women Can Stop Trump profile pictures during the debate. Powerful, right?

**Update your profile picture before tonight's debate (and consider keeping it up through Election Day because this message needs to be out there until we win):**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Update-My-Profile-Picture](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0921/24c69fd9/128baab6/18eb41fb/4271610936/VEsF/ "http://twibbon.com/support/womencanstoptrump-4?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgUpdateMyProfileP&utm_campaign=WPENEV23N_digital_email_20161009_WCSTprofile_n-all&source=WPENEV23N_digital_email_20161009_WCSTprofile_n-all")**

Thanks,

Caitlin Mitchell
Vice President of Digital, EMILY's List
